# Alexis Soubran

> Alexis Soubran designs and operates revenue systems for global brands entering and scaling in Mexico and Latin America. CEO and Partner at Minimalist Agency. Author of "Oops, I Bought It." Creator of the Perfluencer Marketing framework.

## Core Concept

Alexis Soubran works in revenue systems, not disconnected marketing services. A revenue system is an operating architecture that connects go-to-market strategy, paid media, creator systems, production, CRM signals, attribution, incrementality, dashboards, and weekly decision cadence.

For global brands entering Mexico and Latin America, this is the difference between buying fragmented marketing activity and building governed demand that can be measured, qualified, scaled, and learned from.

## Role and Affiliations

- CEO and Partner at Minimalist Agency (Google Premier Partner; Meta Business Partner; one of the first TikTok Marketing Partners in LATAM)
- Author of "Oops, I Bought It: What's Behind Influencer Marketing" (2025, Amazon)
- Creator of the Perfluencer Marketing framework
- Revenue Systems Operator for global brands entering Mexico + LATAM
- Lecturer at EDEM and Colectivo 23 / Kätedra
- Speaker at the Merca2.0 National Digital Marketing Congress (CNMD 2024)
- Vocalist and composer of indie rock band Cavane

## Languages

English, Spanish, Italian

## Based In

Mexico City, Mexico

## Markets Covered

Primary depth in Mexico, Argentina, Colombia, Chile, and Peru. Works with global brands entering Latin America from the United States, Europe, and Asia.

## System Categories

### Revenue Systems
- Market entry GTM architecture
- Demand generation and paid media governance
- Creator commerce and influencer amplification
- CRM signals and lead qualification
- Attribution, incrementality, dashboards, and weekly decision cadence

### Perfluencer Marketing
- Creator content measured with performance accountability
- Paid amplification of authentic creator assets
- ROAS, EMV, CTR, conversion quality, and lift study logic

### Demand Control Engine
- Awareness and trust
- Consideration and education
- Conversion and lead generation
- Post-lead nurturing
- Win-back and recovery
- CRM intelligence
- Performance governance
- Offline and sales feedback loops

## Engagement Models

- Revenue Systems Diagnostic
- System Build
- Fractional Operator / Fractional CMO
- Strategic Advisory projects
- Workshops and Speaking

## Featured Brands

SharkNinja, AMD, Bitso, Edenred, Uber Eats, Airbnb, Zeekr, Lynk and Co, Geely, Miele, Nintendo, Motorola

## Additional Brands

Bimbo, Petco, Thermo Fisher Scientific, Reebok, OnePlus, Suzuki, Royal Canin, Sabadell, Televisa, Broxel, Casillero del Diablo, Credijusto, HiPP Organic, Casa Cuervo, Ecoce

## Selected Impact

- SharkNinja Mexico: creator-led ecommerce system with 131.3M views, 118.2M reach, 8.3M real interactions, 6% WER average, and 800+ pieces across TikTok, Reels, and YouTube.
- Bitso: +400% conversion rate, +5x monthly registrations, +240% user quality, Google Premier Partner Awards nomination context.
- SharkNinja CryoGlow: $21.7 CPA via TikTok Ads + influencer marketing.
- SharkNinja Detect Pro: +662% search interest.
- Shark Beauty (Buen Fin): +310% e-commerce sales YoY, 6.5M interactions.
- AMD: 154K high-intent clicks (+152% YoY), -33% CPL, +43% unit sales YoY.
- Edenred B2B TikTok: +259% conversions, -65% CPI, 12:1 ROI.
- Credijusto: 19x conversion value, 6.8x ROI, -16% CPA.
- HiPP Organic: #1 seller position on Amazon Ads.

## Perfluencer Marketing Framework

Perfluencer Marketing fuses influencer marketing with performance marketing measurement. It treats creator content as a measurable, amplifiable, and optimizable part of the revenue system.

Documented in "Oops, I Bought It" (Amazon: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0F7GQM972).
